overall_summary: elizaOS is undergoing a strategic pivot toward immediate revenue generation through a venture model and focused project teams. Technical efforts are concurrently shifting toward the v2.0.0 release, featuring a major database refactor and the removal of legacy migration code.
key_facts: Core leadership announced a shift to a venture model with small teams and fixed budgets to prioritize immediate revenue over traditional standups.
PR #6521 removed approximately 2,600 lines of code, specifically eliminating auto-migration functionality from versions 1.4.x to 1.6.x.
The 'fomolt' agentic trading platform was introduced, featuring CLI tools, paymaster-supported gas with USDC, and API key authentication on the Base blockchain.
Team members confirmed development of a 1% fee OTC Agent at tradingdesk.fun and a Duel Betting system in Hyperscape with a 2%+1% fee structure.
Odilitime reported performance bottlenecks where agents are hitting 200k token limits due to excessive plugin data and bootstrap providers.
The project submitted a formal entry to the PumpFun hackathon as announced by ElizaBAO.
Database refactoring for v2.0.0 is being coordinated between Stan and Odilitime to ensure Row Level Security (RLS) maintenance.
The team confirmed acquisition offers have been received but leadership is prioritizing profitability to secure a higher valuation.
open_questions: What are the specific budgets allocated per project under the new venture model?
Is v2.0.0 still considered a priority project given it was omitted from the list of immediate revenue-generating priorities?
Are Odilitime and Shadow taking over Eliza Cloud operations specifically?

twitter_news_highlights.claim: Shawmakesmagic shared an upgrade announcement for elizaOS token holders, sparking debate on whether benefits apply to $milady.ai or elizaOS.

new_issues_prs.title: Database Refactoring and Migration removal
new_issues_prs.author: standujar
new_issues_prs.significance: Removes legacy migration code to streamline v2.0.0 and aligns RLS isolation with v1 patterns.

new_issues_prs.title: SolCex Exchange plugin
new_issues_prs.author: Ogie
new_issues_prs.significance: Adds autonomous business development capabilities for crypto exchange listings.

overall_focus.claim: The focus has shifted toward v2.0.0 stability, specifically removing technical debt (legacy migrations) and optimizing the database layer for long-term performance.

discord_updates.summary: Strategic restructuring to focus on immediate profitability through projects like Agent Arena, Babylon, and Eliza Cloud to avoid acquisition-driven decisions.
Introduction of the fomolt trading platform and administrative troubleshooting regarding role permissions for the xfn and milady rooms.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Community members expressed concern over token price stagnation and questioned if development had stalled; leadership re-affirmed active development.
Users found the image generation plugin hierarchy confusing, leading to recommendations to use plugin-bootstrap instead of older packages.

strategic_insights.insight: The pivot from a broad dev-led roadmap to a 'kill fast' revenue-generating model indicates a response to financial constraints and a drive toward terminal profitability.
implications_or_questions: How will this impact long-term core framework updates if they don't produce immediate revenue?
Will this alienate contributors working on non-revenue projects?

market_analysis.observation: Market volatility is expected due to a large spot/futures pair trade position identified from Jane Street.
market_analysis.relevance: Broader market conditions are cited by the team as the secondary cause of ELIZAOS price stagnation.
